title: Natco Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Natco Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
